    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    R

    registerBid(String) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Registers a bid as the current player and advances to the next player.
    registerBid(String, Suit) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Registers a bid with newTrumpSuit as the current player and advances to the next player.
    registerBids(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    A method for processing a certain bid for the players.
    registerBids(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for processing a certain bid for the players.
    registerBids(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.ScoreGame
    Transforms a String-BidType map into a Player-BidType ordered map and delegates to ScoreRound.
    registerBids(LinkedHashMap) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.ScoreRound
    Registers the final bids of the players for this ScoreRound and determines the final bid.
    registerFinalBid(BidType, ArrayList, boolean) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for register the final bid into the current round.
    registerLoneProposer(String) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
    registerLoneProposer(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
    registerLoneProposer(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
    registerLoneProposer(Player) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
    registerNbOfTricksWonPerPlayer(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Registers the number of tricks won per player for every player at once.
    registerPlayCard(String) - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Called when the active user (tries to) play a card.
    requiresTrumpInput(BidType) - Static method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for finding whether a bid type requires extra input from the user.
    restartFailedRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for restarting a round where the bidding phase failed.
    restartFailedRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A method for restarting a round where the bidding phase failed.
    restartRound() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for restarting the round after the bidding failed.
    Round - Class in whistapp.domain.round
     
    Round(ArrayList) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    A constructor for the abstract Round class instantiating the players.
